pi_items.source: setup_qgis.sh creates this file at line 104-114 with two LineString features (Road 1 and Road 2)
setup_qgis.sh creates this file at line 61-85 with two Polygon features (Area A and Area B)

Geometric analysis: Road 1 (coords -122.5 to -122.1) crosses polygon boundary at -122.2, splitting into 2 features (Area A and Area B). Road 2 (lon -122.4) lies entirely in Area A as 1 feature. Total: 2 + 1 = 3
sample_lines.geojson contains only LineString features. Intersection of lines with polygons produces LineString results.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses two synthetic GeoJSON datasets created by setup_qgis.sh: sample_lines.geojson contains 2 LineString features (Road 1 spanning lon -122.5 to -122.1, and Road 2 at lon -122.4), while sample_polygon.geojson contains 2 Polygon features (Area A from lon -122.5 to -122.2, and Area B from lon -122.2 to -121.9). The intersection operation correctly produces 3 LineString features: Road 1 is split at the polygon boundary into 2 segments, and Road 2 remains as 1 segment entirely within Area A. Output is expected at /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/roads_by_zone.geojson
